---
title: "ST606 Project - 8. Additional Plots"
author: "Kessiya Mary Jose - 25250360"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%X %d %B, %Y')`"
output: html_document
---

#### Setup
```{r setup, message=FALSE, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, cache = TRUE,
                      cache.path = "cache/")
library(tidyverse)
library(rjags)
library(coda)
library(parallel)
library(plotly)

options(mc.cores = 6)
```

#### Load dataset and prepare species data
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
final_data <- read_csv("final_dataset_expanded2.csv",
                       show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    date            = as.Date(paste(year, month, "01", sep = "-")),
    temp_scaled     = as.numeric(scale(mean_temp)),
    rainfall_scaled = as.numeric(scale(rainfall_mm)),
    site            = as.integer(factor(station))
  )

fox_data <- final_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(species == "Vulpes vulpes",
                total_sightings >= 1)

hare_data <- final_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(species == "Lepus timidus subsp. hibernicus",
                total_sightings >= 1)

marten_data <- final_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(species == "Martes martes",
                total_sightings >= 1)

# Loading saved model coefficients
combined_results <- read_csv("combined_model_coefficients.csv",
                             show_col_types = FALSE)

cat("Data loaded successfully\n")
cat("Fox rows:", nrow(fox_data), "\n")
cat("Hare rows:", nrow(hare_data), "\n")
cat("Marten rows:", nrow(marten_data), "\n")
```


#### Plot 1 - Predicted sightings vs temperature with observed data
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
# This plot shows the model's predicted temperature curve
# with the actual observed data points overlaid on top
# This shows how well the model captures the temperature pattern

# Function to get predictions along temperature range
get_temp_predictions <- function(species_name, species_data) {

  # Getting coefficients for this species
  coefs <- combined_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(species == species_name)

  b0 <- coefs$posterior_mean[coefs$parameter == "beta0"]
  b1 <- coefs$posterior_mean[coefs$parameter == "beta1"]
  b2 <- coefs$posterior_mean[coefs$parameter == "beta2"]

  # Temperature sequence
  temp_seq <- seq(min(species_data$temp_scaled),
                  max(species_data$temp_scaled),
                  length.out = 200)

  # Converting back to Celsius
  temp_mean_val <- mean(species_data$mean_temp)
  temp_sd_val   <- sd(species_data$mean_temp)
  temp_celsius  <- temp_seq * temp_sd_val + temp_mean_val

  # Predicted at mean rainfall and average seasonal effect
  predicted <- exp(b0 + b1 * temp_seq + b2 * temp_seq^2)

  data.frame(
    temperature = temp_celsius,
    predicted   = predicted,
    species     = species_name
  )
}

# Getting predictions
fox_temp_pred    <- get_temp_predictions(
  "Vulpes vulpes (Fox)", fox_data)
hare_temp_pred   <- get_temp_predictions(
  "Lepus timidus (Hare)", hare_data)
marten_temp_pred <- get_temp_predictions(
  "Martes martes (Pine marten)", marten_data)

all_temp_preds <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  fox_temp_pred, hare_temp_pred, marten_temp_pred)

# Observed data for overlay
observed_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  fox_data    %>% dplyr::mutate(species = "Vulpes vulpes (Fox)"),
  hare_data   %>% dplyr::mutate(species = "Lepus timidus (Hare)"),
  marten_data %>% dplyr::mutate(species = "Martes martes (Pine marten)")
)

# Plotting
ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = observed_data,
             aes(x = mean_temp, y = total_sightings),
             alpha = 0.2, colour = "grey50", size = 1) +
  geom_line(data = all_temp_preds,
            aes(x = temperature, y = predicted, colour = species),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~species, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title    = "Predicted sightings vs temperature with observed data",
    subtitle = "Grey points = observed data, coloured line = model prediction",
    x        = "Mean monthly temperature (°C)",
    y        = "Sightings"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("plot_predicted_vs_temp_observed.png", width = 14, height = 6)
cat("Saved: plot_predicted_vs_temp_observed.png\n")
```


#### Plot 2 - Predicted sightings vs rainfall with observed data
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=6}
# Temperature held at mean value (scaled = 0)

get_rain_predictions <- function(species_name, species_data) {

  coefs <- combined_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(species == species_name)

  b0 <- coefs$posterior_mean[coefs$parameter == "beta0"]
  b3 <- coefs$posterior_mean[coefs$parameter == "beta3"]

  rain_seq <- seq(min(species_data$rainfall_scaled),
                  max(species_data$rainfall_scaled),
                  length.out = 200)

  rain_mean_val <- mean(species_data$rainfall_mm)
  rain_sd_val   <- sd(species_data$rainfall_mm)
  rain_mm       <- rain_seq * rain_sd_val + rain_mean_val

  # Temperature held at mean (scaled = 0), no seasonal effect
  predicted <- exp(b0 + b3 * rain_seq)

  data.frame(
    rainfall  = rain_mm,
    predicted = predicted,
    species   = species_name
  )
}

fox_rain_pred    <- get_rain_predictions(
  "Vulpes vulpes (Fox)", fox_data)
hare_rain_pred   <- get_rain_predictions(
  "Lepus timidus (Hare)", hare_data)
marten_rain_pred <- get_rain_predictions(
  "Martes martes (Pine marten)", marten_data)

all_rain_preds <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  fox_rain_pred, hare_rain_pred, marten_rain_pred)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = observed_data,
             aes(x = rainfall_mm, y = total_sightings),
             alpha = 0.2, colour = "grey50", size = 1) +
  geom_line(data = all_rain_preds,
            aes(x = rainfall, y = predicted, colour = species),
            linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~species, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title    = "Predicted sightings vs rainfall with observed data",
    subtitle = "Grey points = observed data, coloured line = model prediction",
    x        = "Monthly rainfall (mm)",
    y        = "Sightings"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("plot_predicted_vs_rainfall_observed.png", width = 14, height = 6)
cat("Saved: plot_predicted_vs_rainfall_observed.png\n")
```


#### Plot 3 - 3D predicted sightings vs temperature and rainfall
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# 3D plot showing predicted sightings as a surface
# over both temperature and rainfall simultaneously

# Function to create 3D surface predictions
get_3d_predictions <- function(species_name, species_data) {

  coefs <- combined_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(species == species_name)

  b0 <- coefs$posterior_mean[coefs$parameter == "beta0"]
  b1 <- coefs$posterior_mean[coefs$parameter == "beta1"]
  b2 <- coefs$posterior_mean[coefs$parameter == "beta2"]
  b3 <- coefs$posterior_mean[coefs$parameter == "beta3"]

  # Creating grid of temperature and rainfall values
  temp_seq <- seq(min(species_data$temp_scaled),
                  max(species_data$temp_scaled),
                  length.out = 50)
  rain_seq <- seq(min(species_data$rainfall_scaled),
                  max(species_data$rainfall_scaled),
                  length.out = 50)

  # Converting back to original scale
  temp_celsius <- temp_seq * sd(species_data$mean_temp) +
                  mean(species_data$mean_temp)
  rain_mm      <- rain_seq * sd(species_data$rainfall_mm) +
                  mean(species_data$rainfall_mm)

  # Creating prediction matrix
  pred_matrix <- outer(temp_seq, rain_seq, function(t, r) {
    exp(b0 + b1 * t + b2 * t^2 + b3 * r)
  })

  list(
    temp_celsius = temp_celsius,
    rain_mm      = rain_mm,
    pred_matrix  = pred_matrix,
    species      = species_name
  )
}

# Getting 3D predictions for each species
fox_3d    <- get_3d_predictions("Vulpes vulpes (Fox)", fox_data)
hare_3d   <- get_3d_predictions("Lepus timidus (Hare)", hare_data)
marten_3d <- get_3d_predictions(
  "Martes martes (Pine marten)", marten_data)

cat("3D predictions calculated for all species\n")
```


#### 3D plot - fox
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Interactive 3D surface plot for fox

plot_ly(
  x = fox_3d$temp_celsius,
  y = fox_3d$rain_mm,
  z = fox_3d$pred_matrix,
  type = "surface",
  colorscale = "Blues",
  showscale  = TRUE
) %>%
  layout(
    title = "Fox - predicted sightings vs temperature and rainfall",
    scene = list(
      xaxis = list(title = "Temperature (°C)"),
      yaxis = list(title = "Rainfall (mm)"),
      zaxis = list(title = "Predicted sightings")
    )
  )
```


#### 3D plot - hare
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_ly(
  x = hare_3d$temp_celsius,
  y = hare_3d$rain_mm,
  z = hare_3d$pred_matrix,
  type = "surface",
  colorscale = "Reds",
  showscale  = TRUE
) %>%
  layout(
    title = "Hare - predicted sightings vs temperature and rainfall",
    scene = list(
      xaxis = list(title = "Temperature (°C)"),
      yaxis = list(title = "Rainfall (mm)"),
      zaxis = list(title = "Predicted sightings")
    )
  )
```


#### 3D plot - pine marten
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_ly(
  x = marten_3d$temp_celsius,
  y = marten_3d$rain_mm,
  z = marten_3d$pred_matrix,
  type = "surface",
  colorscale = "Greens",
  showscale  = TRUE
) %>%
  layout(
    title = "Pine marten - predicted sightings vs temperature and rainfall",
    scene = list(
      xaxis = list(title = "Temperature (°C)"),
      yaxis = list(title = "Rainfall (mm)"),
      zaxis = list(title = "Predicted sightings")
    )
  )
```


#### Plot 4 - Combined temperature and rainfall effects panel
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
# Temperature effects data
temp_effects <- all_temp_preds %>%
  dplyr::mutate(predictor = "Temperature (°C)",
                x_value   = temperature)

# Rainfall effects data
rain_effects <- all_rain_preds %>%
  dplyr::mutate(predictor = "Rainfall (mm)",
                x_value   = rainfall)

# Renaming columns to match
temp_plot_data <- temp_effects %>%
  dplyr::select(x_value, predicted, species, predictor)

rain_plot_data <- rain_effects %>%
  dplyr::select(x_value, predicted, species, predictor)

combined_effects <- dplyr::bind_rows(temp_plot_data, rain_plot_data)

# Plotting
ggplot(combined_effects,
       aes(x = x_value, y = predicted, colour = species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_grid(species ~ predictor, scales = "free") +
  labs(
    title    = "Combined weather effects on mammal sightings",
    subtitle = "Left: temperature effect (rainfall at mean). Right: rainfall effect (temperature at mean)",
    x        = "Predictor value",
    y        = "Predicted mean sightings"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("plot_combined_weather_effects.png", width = 14, height = 10)
cat("Saved: plot_combined_weather_effects.png\n")
```
